query:
INSERT INTO images (blob_sha256, model_id, kind, mime, source_file_id,
                                   renderer, renderer_config, width, height,
                                   is_primary, created_by)
               VALUES ($1, $2, $3::image_kind, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9, true, $10)
               ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
